name: crm114
description: Statistical text classification plugin using the CRM114 Discriminator. Stores per-category CSS model files in pluginStorage.

process.description: Classify document text against all trained category models and return pR scores.

pluginStorage.description: Path to the plugin storage directory containing trained .css model files.

textContent.description: Extracted text content of the document, provided by the pipeline.

documentText.description: Markdown text extracted by the markitdown plugin. Used when textContent is not available.

ocrText.description: OCR-extracted text content, used when textContent and documentText are not available.

categories.description: Array of objects with categoryName and pR score for each trained model.

manageCategories.description: Interactive one-time category setup: list, add, and remove classification categories in pluginStorage.

usage.description: Output directory; pluginStorage is derived from it as <outputDir>/.doc.doc.md/crm114/.

train.description: Per-document interactive labeling command (designed for doc.doc.sh loop). Displays file path and first 100 words, then prompts t/u/s per category.

pluginStorage.description: Path to the plugin storage directory.

textContent.description: Extracted text content of the document.

learn.description: Non-interactive: train a category model with text from the provided document.

category.description: Category name to train (alphanumeric, dash, underscore, dot only).

pluginStorage.description: Path to the plugin storage directory.

ocrText.description: OCR text content to train on.

unlearn.description: Non-interactive: remove text from a category model.

category.description: Category name to untrain (alphanumeric, dash, underscore, dot only).

pluginStorage.description: Path to the plugin storage directory.

textContent.description: Text content to remove from the model.

ocrText.description: OCR text content to remove from the model.

listCategories.description: List all category names that have a trained .css model in pluginStorage.

pluginStorage.description: Path to the plugin storage directory.

categories.description: Array of category name strings; empty array if no trained models exist.

installed.description: Check if crm114 and required CRM114 tools (csslearn, cssunlearn) are installed and available.
Whether crm114 tools are installed and available on PATH.
